Philanthropist Jean Shafiroff was honored along with other prominent New Yorkers at the National Action Network's <hide>rd Annual Women of Excellence/ Man of Vision Luncheon at the Astoria World Manor in Astoria, Queens.
Ms. Shafiroff was honored for her outstanding service & dedicated commitment in philanthropy.
Other honorees included the Honorable Machelle Sweeting, Dr. Cynthia Ashley and Korey Wise.
Audrey Smaltz served as emcee.
The event attracted close to <hide> notable New Yorkers.
Melissa Joan Hart visited New York's BUILD SERIES the other day, wearing a beautiful red jacket with bright yellow shoes.
Spring fashion is here!
Sanaa Lathan was all smiles when she was photographed at The HBO Films "Native Son" red-carpet screening event at the Solomon R. Guggenheim Museum the other day in New York City.

Often combining and amplifying strategies of verité filmmaking, conceptual art, music video, esoteric and scientific research, he creates a post-documentary space in which disparate belief-systems and histories are thrown into an interpretive limbo.
Shaw participated in the <hide>th Venice Biennale (<hide>) and is the recipient of the <hide> Sobey Art Award.
Solo exhibitions include Kunstverein in Hamburg (<hide>), Montreal Museum of Fine Arts (<hide>), The Store x The Vinyl Factory, London (<hide>), Schinkel Pavillon, Berlin (<hide>), MoMA PS<hide>, New York (<hide>), and Museum of Contemporary Canadian Art, Toronto (<hide>).

Thomson Power Systems resistive test load banks utilize coiled chromium alloy load elements supported with cool cast ceramic insulators.
<hide>.<hide>" maximum continuous spacing is provided between each support point.
All load resistor ends are fitted with silver soldered stainless steel connection studs.Thomson's "cool load®" resistor design guarantee slower operating temperatures and extended life in the most adverse environments.
Each "cool load®" resistor is mounted in removable load resistor frames.
Load resistor frames are designed for dual pass "cool load®" resistors.
Removable racks and dual pass "cool load®" resistors provide superior serviceability and reliability.
Five standard load resistor frames are used in a single or stacked configuration for load banks from <hide>kW to <hide>kW.
